items.title: Dearest gentle codexer.
items.title_zh: 最亲爱的温柔的编解码器。
items.description: Dearest gentle codexer. We did a sneaky double reset. Not only do you get a full reset on us. But you are also getting one into the reset bank to use at your own leisure. Enjoy https://t.co/eORoaKb3pL
items.description_zh: 最亲爱的温柔的编解码器。我们偷偷地进行了双重重置。您不仅可以对我们进行全面重置。但您也可以将一张存入重置银行，以便在闲暇时使用。享受 https://t.co/eORoaKb3pL

items.title: Watched Mortal Kombat 2 and it was terrible.

items.title: taste" is not just taste in aesthetics, the same way "design" is not just visual design.
items.title_zh: 品味”不仅仅是审美品味，同样，“设计”不仅仅是视觉设计。
items.description: "taste" is not just taste in aesthetics, the same way "design" is not just visual design. feels like half the conversations on the subject are people talking past each other because of this distinction
items.description_zh: “品味”不仅仅是审美上的品味，同样“设计”不仅仅是视觉设计。由于这种区别，感觉关于这个主题的对话有一半是人们互相谈论
